items.title: Warriors/Rockets 🤝 Thunder/Spurs
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
Warriors/Rockets 🤝 Thunder/Spurs

This is the first 2-2 WCF series tie since GSW/HOU in 2018… and when the Conference Finals are tied 2-2, the Game 5 winner advances 76.4% (42-13) of the time!

items.title: May 25, 1994: Hakeem Olajuwon goes for 41 PTS (14-22 FG)/13 REB/6 AST/3 BLK in Houston's 104-99 win over Utah in Game 2 of the Western Conference Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 25, 1994: Hakeem Olajuwon goes for 41 PTS (14-22 FG)/13 REB/6 AST/3 BLK in Houston's 104-99 win over Utah in Game 2 of the Western Conference Finals.

Mario Elie added 17 PTS off the bench for the Rockets, who took a 2-0 series lead. Karl Malone had 32 PTS/7 AST for the Jazz.

items.title: Believe it or not, Spurs-Thunder is the first NBA conference final to be tied 2-2 after four games since 2022 (Celtics-Heat) -- and first WCF to be tied since 2018 (Rockets-Warriors).
items.author: Sports Media Watch
items.body_excerpt:
Believe it or not, Spurs-Thunder is the first NBA conference final to be tied 2-2 after four games since 2022 (Celtics-Heat) -- and first WCF to be tied since 2018 (Rockets-Warriors).

This is only the second time since *2014* that the WCF has been tied 2-2.

items.title: May 24, 1995: Hakeem Olajuwon finishes with 41 PTS/16 REB/3 STL while battling league MVP David Robinson during Houston's 106-96 win at San Antonio in Game 2 of the Western Conference Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 24, 1995: Hakeem Olajuwon finishes with 41 PTS/16 REB/3 STL while battling league MVP David Robinson during Houston's 106-96 win at San Antonio in Game 2 of the Western Conference Finals.

The victory gave the Rockets a 2-0 series lead over the Spurs.

items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 23, 1997: Houston's Sedale Threatt dishes to Kevin Willis for two points during the Rockets' 118-100 win over the Utah Jazz in Game 3 of the WCF.

Also for the Rockets, Eddie Johnson scored 31 PTS (12-17 FG/5-8 3P) off the bench and Hakeem Olajuwon had 27 PTS/3 BLK.

items.title: May 23, 1984: Houston wins a coin flip over Portland, and will draft first in the upcoming NBA Draft.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 23, 1984: Houston wins a coin flip over Portland, and will draft first in the upcoming NBA Draft.

Rockets head coach Bill Fitch says they will use the #1 pick to select Akeem Olajuwon. Blazers owner Larry Weinberg said his team is "very interested" in taking Sam Bowie at #2.

items.title: May 22, 1993: Highlights from overtime of Game 7 in the Western Conference Semifinals between Seattle and Houston.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 22, 1993: Highlights from overtime of Game 7 in the Western Conference Semifinals between Seattle and Houston.

Sam Perkins had 23 PTS (10-13 FG)/9 REB and hit the game-winning shot in the SuperSonics' 103-100 victory. Hakeem Olajuwon had 23 PTS/17 REB/9 AST for the Rockets.

items.title: SGA (30p, 9a in Game 2) led a balanced OKC attack to even the series, marking the first time the WCF are tied 1-1 since Warriors/Rockets in 2018.
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
SGA (30p, 9a in Game 2) led a balanced OKC attack to even the series, marking the first time the WCF are tied 1-1 since Warriors/Rockets in 2018.

As the series shifts to San Antonio, both teams seek a 2-1 lead in the NBA Conference Finals presented by Google!

Game 3 • 8:30pm/et, NBC & Peacock 🍿

items.title: Houston Rockets
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt: Houston Rockets NBA

items.title: May 22, 1995: Houston's Clyde Drexler dunks on Sean Elliott during a 94-93 win at San Antonio in Game 1 of the Western Conference Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 22, 1995: Houston's Clyde Drexler dunks on Sean Elliott during a 94-93 win at San Antonio in Game 1 of the Western Conference Finals.

Drexler finished with 25 PTS/12 REB and Hakeem Olajuwon had 27 PTS/8 REB/6 AST/5 BLK for the Rockets. Elliott scored 24 PTS for the Spurs.
